title: felicia tenella subsp. longifolia
intro: Felicia tenella subsp. longifolia, also known as Cape daisy or felicia, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Felicia tenella subsp. longifolia include treating wounds, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues, while also being used as a natural remedy for colds and respiratory problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
